metadata.title: JBI Smile Design | Dental clinic in Chisinau
metadata.description: Modern dental clinic in Chisinau. Dental therapy, endodontics, orthodontics, implantology, prosthetics and cosmetic dentistry.
metadata.ogDescription: Complete dental services in Chisinau. Fast appointments, communication in RO / EN / RU.

clinic.name: JBI Smile Design
clinic.tagline: Your smile, designed with care and precision
clinic.shortDescription: A modern dental clinic in Chisinau with complete services, clear communication and personalized treatments for every patient.
clinic.footerDescription: A modern dental clinic in Chisinau. Complete treatments, clear communication and a comfortable experience for every patient.
clinic.whatsappText: Hello! I would like to book a consultation at JBI Smile Design.

hero.rating: Happy patients, clear communication and comfort at every visit.

services.title: Complete treatments for the whole family
services.description: From prevention and basic treatments to implantology and cosmetic dentistry — everything in one place, with a personalized plan for every patient.

items.title: Dental therapy
items.description: Precise cavity diagnosis and durable aesthetic restorations with high-quality materials.

items.title: Endodontics
items.description: Modern endodontic treatments under magnification to preserve the natural tooth.

items.title: Orthodontics
items.description: Fixed and removable braces, plus clear aligners for a balanced smile.

items.title: Dental implantology
items.description: Complete implant solutions with digital planning and comfortable recovery.

items.title: Dental prosthetics
items.description: Aesthetic and functional prosthetic restorations made with modern technologies.

items.title: Periodontal treatments
items.description: Prevention and treatment of periodontal disease for healthy gums long term.

items.title: Pediatric dentistry
items.description: A gentle and friendly approach for children in a calm, safe environment.

items.title: Cosmetic dentistry
items.description: Professional whitening, ceramic veneers and aesthetic treatments for a bright smile.

about.title: Modern dentistry built around the patient
about.text: JBI Smile Design is a dental clinic in Chisinau created for patients who want modern treatments, clear communication and a comfortable medical experience. We focus on accurate diagnosis, personalized treatment and a relationship of trust with every patient.

features.title: Personalized approach
features.text: A plan tailored to every patient.

team.title: A team close to the patient
team.text: At JBI Smile Design, every patient receives clear explanations, attentive treatment and support at every stage. We want each visit to feel calm and clear — from diagnosis to care recommendations.
team.imageAlt: JBI Smile Design team at reception

points.title: Clear communication
points.text: Explanations you can understand at every step.

points.title: Comfort-first care
points.text: Modern techniques for treatments with minimal discomfort.

points.title: Personalized plan
points.text: A treatment plan adapted to your needs.

process.title: The consultation steps
process.description: From the first contact to final recommendations, every step is designed to be clear, comfortable and transparent.

steps.title: Contact and booking
steps.text: You message or call us — we choose a suitable time together.

steps.title: Initial consultation
steps.text: We discuss your needs, expectations and dental history.

steps.title: Diagnosis and analysis
steps.text: Clinical and imaging examination for an accurate diagnosis.

steps.title: Treatment plan
steps.text: We present a personalized plan with clear options and costs.

steps.title: Treatment
steps.text: Comfortable steps with explanations throughout the process.

steps.title: Recommendations and follow-up
steps.text: Care instructions and regular checkups for lasting results.

video.title: See the atmosphere at JBI Smile Design
video.description: A short look inside the clinic — reception, modern rooms and the team that will support you throughout treatment.

reviews.title: What our patients say
reviews.description: Our patients appreciate the professionalism, communication and comfort of their clinic experience.

items.name: Ana M.
items.text: A very professional team, an impeccable clinic and everything went pain-free. Highly recommended!

items.name: Victor C.
items.text: The best dental experience I have had. Clear explanations and excellent results.

items.name: Elena P.
items.text: Warm atmosphere and attentive staff. My child was relaxed from the first visit.

items.name: Dmitri R.
items.text: Very satisfied with the implantology treatment. Professionalism at the highest level.

contact.title: Visit the clinic or message us
contact.description: We are only one message away. Our team responds quickly and helps you find the best time for an appointment.
contact.appointmentsText: Fill in the form and our team will contact you as soon as possible to confirm the exact time. Prefer phone? We are available on WhatsApp and by phone.
contact.scheduleText: Appointments are confirmed on working days. During the weekend, we respond from Monday morning.

appointment.gdpr: I agree to the processing of my personal data according to the
appointment.afterSubmit: The appointment will be confirmed by phone by our team.
appointment.successTitle: Thank you! Your request has been sent.
appointment.successText: The JBI Smile Design team will contact you shortly to confirm the exact appointment time.
appointment.slotPickDate: Choose the date first, then you will see available time slots.
appointment.slotError: We could not check availability. Please try again in a few seconds.
appointment.closedFallback: The clinic is closed on this day
appointment.noSlots: There are no available time slots for this day.
appointment.unavailableLegend: Unavailable — occupied slot or too close to another appointment
appointment.networkError: We could not connect to the server. Please try again.
appointment.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us by phone.

api.notConfigured: The appointment system is not configured yet. Please call us or message us on WhatsApp.
api.slotTaken: This slot has just been booked by someone else. Please choose another slot.
api.saveFailed: We could not save the appointment. Please try again or call us.

email.patientSubject: We received your appointment request — JBI Smile Design
email.clinicIntro: You received a new request through the website.
email.patientIntro: We received your appointment request at JBI Smile Design. Our team will contact you shortly to confirm the exact time.
email.automatic: Sent automatically by the JBI Smile Design website.
email.autoNotice: This email is sent automatically. For urgent questions, call us or message us on WhatsApp.

cookie.title: Cookie settings
cookie.text: We use necessary cookies for the website to work and, with your consent, analytics and marketing cookies. See
cookie.necessaryText: Required for website functionality and security.
cookie.analyticsText: Helps us understand how the website is used.

legal.notice: Informational material prepared for legal review before publication.

privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.description: How we collect, use and protect personal data sent to JBI Smile Design.

sections.title: Who we are
sections.body: JBI Smile Design is a dental clinic in Chisinau. Data sent through the website is used to contact patients and manage appointment requests.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.body: We may collect name, phone, email, desired service, preferred date and time, message content and minimum technical data needed for anti-spam protection.

sections.title: Purpose of processing
sections.body: We use the data to answer requests, confirm appointments and improve communication with patients.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You can request access, correction or deletion of your personal data by contacting the clinic email address.

cookie-policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie-policy.description: Information about necessary, analytics and marketing cookies used on the website.

sections.title: What cookies are
sections.body: Cookies are small files saved in the browser to store preferences and help the website work correctly.

sections.title: Necessary cookies
sections.body: These are used for basic website functionality, security and remembering consent preferences.

sections.title: Analytics and marketing
sections.body: These categories are enabled only with your consent and may be used to measure performance and campaigns.

sections.title: Changing preferences
sections.body: You can clear preferences in your browser or request a reset at any time.

termeni-conditii.title: Terms and conditions
termeni-conditii.description: General terms for using the JBI Smile Design website.

sections.title: Website use
sections.body: The website provides information about the clinic and allows sending an appointment request. The information does not replace a medical consultation.

sections.title: Appointments
sections.body: A request sent through the form is confirmed only after phone or message contact from the clinic team.

sections.title: Content
sections.body: Texts, images and brand elements belong to JBI Smile Design or its partners and may not be reused without permission.

sections.title: Limitations
sections.body: We aim to keep information accurate, but schedule, service or availability changes may occur.
